title: oncostemum laurifolium
intro: Oncostemum laurifolium, also known as the 'Hills Button Bush', is a type of flowering plant native to Australia. This shrub-like plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and flowers, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and fever. The health benefits of Oncostemum laurifolium include its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a popular herbal remedy for soothing coughs and congestion. Herbal preparations of Oncostemum laurifolium can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and relieve symptoms of colds and flu.
